chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 901 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.4918/2018 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 10.10.2023 Mr. Deedar Ali M. Chohan, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel states that parties have patched up outside of the Court; hence, he does not press this petition, which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
